Description: Stable identifier for the exported reconstruction-family response table.
Public reconstruction-family identifier; at least two families are required.
Family class, such as SN_branch, BAO_branch, joint_reconstruction, or backreaction_control.
Public source product or manifest identifier used to derive the response.
Integer row key matching the coordinate-native target rows.
ValidationRule: integer; every usable target GridIndex must appear for every FamilyID

Description: Coordinate-native depth coordinate used by the source-split target.
Coordinate mapping identifier; must match the target-space mapping.
Family response value in the source-split benchmark space.
Uncertainty proxy or covariance-derived marginal sigma for the response.
Sign of the response value: -1, 0, or 1.
ValidationRule: one of -1, 0, 1 and consistent with ResponseValue

Description: True only if the response is exported in the coordinate-native target space.
True when the family uses public SN input products.
True when the family uses public BAO input products.
Must be false for scoring-grade locked benchmark inputs.
Must state that the export is benchmark input only, not measurement validation.
ValidationRule: must not contain discovery or validation claim
